reasoning: The question asks for the probability that the daily average temperature at Caen-Carpiquet Airport on the resolution date(s) will be higher than on 2025-10-26. The close date is late January 2026. Climatologically, late October in Caen has an average daily temperature of around 11°C, while November through January average between 4°C and 8°C. Both days have a standard deviation of about 3-4°C. The probability of a random day in winter being warmer than a random day in late October is given by the difference of these distributions: P(T_winter > T_Oct26). Using typical winter distributions (mean ~5-7°C) compared to late October (mean ~11°C), the difference is roughly -5°C with a standard deviation of ~5°C. Thus, the probability of the winter date being warmer is normally around 10-20%. Without knowing the specific date(s) (as they are omitted from the prompt), 15% is a robust climatological average for a winter day exceeding late October's temperature.
